reviews.review_description: Game is awesome, the npcs interact and talk, there’s plenty of traffic, the map is giant, I loved looking at the stars near a hill, it gives GTA San Andreas vibes, I wish the settings saved and that NPCs took more damage to kill, and that they’d fight back, but for now this is a great game to buy if you want to explore and have fun
you are given zero guidance on where to go comma the npcs are extremely glitchy, overall just a terrible experience
